Package com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components

Class FinraCoaCode

java.lang.Object
com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components.FinraCoaCode
public class FinraCoaCode extends Object
FinraCoaCode

The FINRA COA code associated with the account

  • Method Details

    • of

      public static FinraCoaCode of(String value)
      Returns a FinraCoaCode with the given value. For a specific value the returned object will always be a singleton so reference equality is satisfied when the values are the same.
      Parameters:
      value - value to be wrapped as FinraCoaCode
